title: 41. Vleeming A., Stoeckart R. The role of the pelvic girdle in cou-
text:
pling the spine and the legs: a clinical-anatomical perspective on
pelvic stability. In: Vleeming A., Mooney V., Stoeckart R., editors.
Movement, stability & lumbopelvic pain, integration of research
and therapy. Edinburgh: Elsevier; 2007.
